channel.title: Yama Chang's Portfolio
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: Geospatial analysis of effectiveness of digital intervention in the rural U.S.
item.author: Yama Chang
item.description: In this project, I visualized data to investigate the effectiveness of utilizing social media-based advertisements and content for the purpose of involving rural adolescents experiencing increased depression symptoms in a randomized trial examining single-session interventions.
